question.content: Split the figure into stages and derive overall gain and equivalent resistances for the multi-stage amplifier. Output exactly one ASCII line with three semicolon-separated fields in the form Au:...;Ri:...;Ro:...; do not use '=' or any equation form, no Chinese characters, no prose sentence, and no extra text.

step_1.content: Split the figure into upper original transistor circuit and lower AC equivalent, then solve stage-wise.
step_1.key_point: Split the figure into upper original transistor circuit.

step_3.content: Analyze the upper circuit to identify differential input stage, voltage-gain stage, and complementary output stage, giving the gain chain Au:Au1*Au2*Au3.
step_3.key_point: Stage decomposition gives gain chain Au = Au1*Au2*Au3.

step_5.content: Use the lower AC equivalent to read resistance expressions and finalize Ri and Ro.
step_5.key_point: The lower AC equivalent to read resistance expressions.
